title: A Fully Integrated Model from Farm to Market
description: We combine deep local expertise with global standards, leveraging innovation, sustainability, and scale to unlock Africa's agricultural potential. From farm to market, we work to build resilient value chains that empower farmers, serve consumers, and create long-term value for stakeholders.

divisions.title: Sourcing & Origination
divisions.description: Direct engagement with farmers and cooperatives to source quality produce.

divisions.title: Processing & Manufacturing
divisions.description: Facilities and partnerships that produce high-quality, value-added products.

divisions.title: Trading & Distribution
divisions.description: Logistics and market access across local and international markets.

divisions.title: Branding & Retail
divisions.description: Consumer-facing products built on quality, traceability, and trust.

divisions.title: Grains & Staples
divisions.description: Maize, wheat, rice, maize flour and essential food commodities across Africa.

divisions.title: Edible Oils & Feed
divisions.description: Soybeans, oil seeds, soybean meal and animal feed ingredients.
